textByHashes.60e6c2644381d366e89048a498b05c442df512a0: Greetings warrior, how may I help you?
textByHashes.6d6f51586f3c38361ad22cf4675a81d80273593c: Oh ever since the Guild opened. I like it here.
textByHashes.5bfab3ed7570ee667b21f5b08ec3d8a67778c23f: Well.. what with all these warriors around, there's not much chance of my bank being robbed is there!
textByHashes.ae60ad402a5ffc034742632d066ca60a57a47c9b: Invest your time and money wisely.
